name: Raw Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
APPLE CAKE: Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Sift together flour, nutmeg, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon, then stir into the creamed mixture alternately with milk (or water). Stir in apples, dates, raisins, and nuts until evenly distributed. Pour batter into a lightly greased and floured 13x9x2 inches pan or tube pan. Bake at 325 degrees F for 1 hour.
APPLE FROSTING: Beat together the margarine and confectioner's sugar until creamy. Stir in vanilla extract. Gradually add 1 to 2 tablespoons of apple juice, beating until the frosting reaches a spreading consistency.
